requirement_coverage.gate_notes: Game renders, title works, New Game works, room navigation works, combat works, dialogue works, menus work. Very playable vertical slice. Missing: rune forge, icons, visual polish.

human_review.notes: Most playable game of all evals. Full game loop works: title → new game → rooms → combat → dialogue → navigation. UX and flow are good. UI is very ASCII/plain — needs spacing, icons, better styling. Color coding is good. No spell crafting despite rune system in requirements. Rest room doesn't offer forge. Score 0.50: playable vertical slice but visually rough.
